programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: All over the world are forbidden triangles that are mysterious regions where ships, planes and people enter and then just disappear; they are found in Bermuda, Alaska, Japan and elsewhere.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Sacred waters with remarkable healing powers; ancient mystics who lived for hundreds of years; a scientific breakthrough may provide the answers to eternal life.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: People go missing every day, but throughout history, there have been strange and eerie disappearances that continue to capture the world's attention.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: While modern science has stopped many dangerous viruses and bacteria in their tracks, there is a concern that contagious germs could be traveling through the vacuum of space.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: From the eerie reports of spontaneous human combustion and the hunt for the Highgate Vampire, to the unsettling boogeymen known as the Men in Black appearing after UFO sightings, could these legends be more than just stories?

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Age-old mysterious ruins stand as silent sentinels from the past, with their true history seemingly erased by time; modern archaeology attempts to unravel the enigma of how and why the ancient structures were built.

programme.title: CSN Mint
programme.desc: Learn about the wonderful world of Coin Collecting with your host Mike Mezack and get the opportunity to build your own collection with the best coin deals on TV!

programme.desc: Learn about the wonderful world of Coin Collecting with your host Mike Mezack and get the opportunity to build your own collection with the best coin deals on TV!

programme.title: The Food That Built America
programme.desc: Bold visionaries risk bringing Mexican food to Americans, creating the top-selling condiment, famous snack chip brands and pairing chips and salsa.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Food That Built America
programme.desc: A farmhand named Jack Daniel and a distiller in Tennessee look to bring their quality bootleg whiskey out of the shadows into a larger market; a new recipe and Daniel's revolutionary branding tactics pave the way for an American whiskey.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Food That Built America
programme.desc: When an entrepreneur creates shelf-stable peanut butter out of his garage, it leads to the birth of an iconic sandwich; as competition heats up to be America's favorite peanut butter, three famous brands battle it out to be number one.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Food That Built America
programme.desc: Four intrepid food entrepreneurs race to harness emerging technologies, like the home freezer and microwave, to bring revolutionary frozen snack icons to a waiting world, and forever change everything about eating.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Food That Built America
programme.desc: Hollywood agent Wally Amos transforms his professional life when he decides to make and sell his own gourmet chocolate chip cookies, and opens America's first cookie store; housewife Debbi Fields opens her homestyle cookie shop in a mall.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Food That Built America
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck Japanese businessman and a Chinese immigrant and her son change the American palette when they introduce instant noodles in a cup, Peking Duck, and a big Chinese restaurant chain in the nation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler
programme.desc: Remember when childhood came with a side of danger? Think back to the toys and daredevil playground antics that once defined growing up; uncovering explosive science kits, high-flying kite tubes and more.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler
programme.desc: A wild journey into the world of vintage daredevils who risked it all for a rush; from the enigmatic Human Fly to skateboard speed demons and diving horses, these stunts are as reckless as they are unforgettable.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler
programme.desc: The everyday products that are way more dangerous than meets the unsuspecting eye; what were the most ill-advised and risky household products?

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler
programme.desc: There was a time when any and all cures could be sold to the public indiscriminately; diving into a world where animal skin can replace your own, where doctors give coffee enemas and a world of heroin-laced cough syrup.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler
programme.desc: The modern concept of extreme sports is a product of marketing, but back in the old days, the lack of rules made them truly extreme; from bone-crushing football and deadly baseball games to wild events like auto polo.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler
programme.desc: Exploding cars and blimp disasters to kids sent through the mail and doomed personal helicopters; the past is packed with travel tales and the misfires that paved the road to modern transportation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler
programme.desc: Snack on a feast of food horrors from the past; from radioactive energy drinks, to scandalous snacks made with Olestra, to the additives in your milk and bread, uncovering the things people once ate without a second thought.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler
programme.desc: Uncovering the downright dangerous gigs of the past, from mercury-poisoned hatmakers to kids crawling through chimneys and projectionists fleeing fiery blazes.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler
programme.desc: Remember when "everybody's doing it" was the reason enough to dive in headfirst?; from gravity-defying flagpole sitting and phone booth cramming, to pet skunks and goldfish gulpers, revealing the crazes that are sweeping the nation; these obsessions are risky and impossible to resist; it is a trip back to the fads that push the limits and make hazardous history must-see mayhem.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Food That Built America
programme.desc: Two pizza juggernauts expand their empires as a new contender turns the fight into a three-way race to become America's big pizza chain; they push the limits with promotions, creations and inventive sides, only to discover a fourth chain charging onto the battlefield.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Food That Built America
programme.desc: In the 1950's, two brothers from Wichita, Kan., aim to build their restaurant, Pizza Hut, by introducing America to Italian dish-pizza; Americans soon fall in love with their pizza, but rival, Domino's, threatens to derail their success.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Remember when "everybody's doing it" was the reason enough to dive in headfirst?; from gravity-defying flagpole sitting and phone booth cramming, to pet skunks and goldfish gulpers, revealing the crazes that are sweeping the nation; these obsessions are risky and impossible to resist; it is a trip back to the fads that push the limits and make hazardous history must-see mayhem.

programme.desc: In the 1950's, two brothers from Wichita, Kan., aim to build their restaurant, Pizza Hut, by introducing America to Italian dish-pizza; Americans soon fall in love with their pizza, but rival, Domino's, threatens to derail their success.

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: 1776 - 2026 250th Anniversary Quarter Celebration Program
programme.desc: 2026 will be one of the most historic years ever in U.S. coinage; join your host Mike Mezack to learn about the incredible U.S. Quarter program and get a chance at an exclusive P&D Roll!

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: Interested in Gold? Learn More!
programme.desc: Gold has been the best long-term asset class for thousands of years; find out how you can protect your financial future by diversifying your nest-egg with physical gold today.

programme.title: Amazing Facts With Doug Batchelor
programme.desc: Pastor Doug Batchelor reveals facts about biblical events and brings new insight to frequently asked questions in Christianity.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: In this weekly program, Dr. David Jeremiah delivers practical messages to the congregation at the Shadow Mountain Community Church in San Diego. Also featured is music from the Shadow Mountain Community Church Choir and Orchestra, as well as performances by musical guests that have included Steve Green and Charles Billingsley. Men and women who have been impacted by the Turning Point ministry also share their stories with viewers. During the month of December, "Turning Point" usually features special Christmas programming.

programme.title: Roanoke: A Mystery Carved in Stone
programme.desc: Stonework experts Jim and Bill Vieira use cutting-edge technology to take a deeper look at a mysterious inscription which could lead to the truth about the disappearance of 117 colonists from Roanoke Island in the sixteenth century.

programme.title: Return to Roanoke: Search for the Seven
programme.desc: Stonework experts Jim and Bill Vieira continue their hunt for the Lost Colony of Roanoke by analyzing the inscription on the mysterious Dare Stone against the 400-year-old historical record.

programme.title: Buried: Knights Templar and the Holy Grail
programme.desc: An investigation into the true fate of the Knights Templar begins in Jerusalem, where tunnels and a safe house may have been used to move holy relics to safety during the fall of the city.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Buried: Knights Templar and the Holy Grail
programme.sub-title: Last Stand in the Holy Land
programme.desc: In Acre, Israel, the team goes underground to investigate the purpose of the Templars' tunnel system, theorizing they may have contemplated a covert landing in sea caves.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Buried: Knights Templar and the Holy Grail
programme.desc: Part 3/4. Armed with insight into two centuries of Templar survival strategies and battle tactics, the team turns their attention to the Templars moment of reckoning: the fall of the order in 1307; they find evidence of a Templar smuggling operation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Buried: Knights Templar and the Holy Grail
programme.desc: Part 4/4. Seven years after the alleged end of the Templars, signs the knights were rising again appear in Portugal.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: In a perfectly planned robbery, thieves steal half a billion dollars in masterpieces from the Gardner Museum in Boston; it's been three decades since the brazen heist, and an exhaustive search has failed to recover the stolen goods.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
